basics.name: AVNISH RANJAN
basics.title: DevOps Engineer
basics.summary: Passionate and driven DevOps Engineer with 1+ year of experience in CI/CD automation, infrastructure management, and software quality engineering. Hands-on exposure to Docker, Linux, AWS, and Terraform with a strong foundation in Python scripting and pipeline automation using Jenkins. Eager to grow and contribute in a collaborative DevOps environment, bringing a solid automation mindset and a continuous learning approach to every challenge. Certified in Python for DevOps and DevOps practices.

bullets: Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Maven, automating build, test, and deployment stages — cutting deployment cycle time from 3 days to 8 hours.
Gained hands-on experience with Docker for containerizing application components and managing consistent environments across development and production.
Wrote automation and utility scripts in Python and Bash to streamline infrastructure tasks and reduce manual effort by 70% across 50+ workflows.
Worked with Linux-based environments for deployment, debugging, and performance monitoring of enterprise applications.
Configured and managed source code workflows via Git/GitHub, enabling smooth collaboration across 12+ production releases.
Monitored application performance using JMeter, simulating 10,000+ concurrent users to ensure system reliability under peak loads.
Collaborated in Agile sprints with developers and QA teams, supporting continuous delivery and maintaining 95% defect detection rate before production.
Developed automation scripts in Python and Java to support testing and deployment workflows.
Managed version control with Git and contributed to open-source projects, strengthening collaborative development skills.

achievements.context: Deployment cycle time reduction via Jenkins & Maven CI/CD
Reduction in manual effort across 50+ workflows via Python/Bash scripts
Production releases managed via Git/GitHub workflows
Concurrent users simulated using JMeter for performance testing
Defect detection rate maintained before production
Improvement in API response time through automated load testing insights

projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline Automation — RoadAthena Platform
bullets: Designed and implemented an end-to-end CI/CD pipeline integrating Jenkins with Maven, Git, and automated test suites.
Containerized build environments using Docker for consistent and reproducible deployments.
Reduced build-to-deploy cycle from 3 days to 8 hours with automated reporting via Extent Reports.

projects.title: API Performance & Load Testing Infrastructure
bullets: Built a performance testing infrastructure using Apache JMeter and Python scripts; stress-tested APIs with 5,000+ virtual users.
Automated report generation using Bash scripts, delivering insights that improved API response time by 35%.

education.coursework: Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Database Management Systems, Data Structures & Algorithms, Software Engineering
